title: delissea longissima
intro: Delissea longissima, also known as Hawaiian mountain bell or long-leaved Delissea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is endemic to the island of Kauai in Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Delissea longissima can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
